data.status: preparing to expand beyond Phoenix for the first time with a brand-new concept; no timeline for an opening yet
data.short_description: The restaurateurs behind Tacos Chiwas are developing Tortillas Chiwas at 914 N. Grande Ave. in Tucson’s Barrio Hollywood. It will take over a historic former tortilla factory with on-site production and an intimate 30-seat restaurant offering fast-casual and seasonal dinner items.

data.status: has closed for renovations; expected to reopen; slated to be completed by mid-July; anticipated to reopen ... by this summer
data.short_description: Lucky Village Chinese Buffet has closed for renovations at its existing Westchase location. The $213,000 project on the 12,800 sq ft space includes interior redesign and construction is underway.

data.status: expected to operate out of the 4D Commissary; anticipated to ... start serving the Valley sometime this year
data.short_description: Kueva, a ghost kitchen subscription dining concept, will operate from the 4D Commissary in the Post & McLeod Industrial Park. It offers an exclusive modern dining experience with world-class ingredients, seasonal chef-driven dishes, and an upscale pastry menu.

data.status: is being built; hoping to debut ... in the summer or fall; under construction
data.short_description: Encanto Coffee is being built at 869 W Jeffery Street in Kankakee by Jessica Jaime. The cafe will offer Mexican-inspired coffee drinks, teas, hot chocolate, and authentic Mexican pastries in a warm space for gathering.

data.location: Truist Center, 214 N Tryon St, Charlotte, NC 28202, USA

data.short_description: A $3.7 million construction permit has been issued for a planned Little Alley Steakhouse space inside Hearst Tower at 214 N. Tryon Street. The Atlanta-based modern steakhouse concept was first announced for Charlotte in 2020 but had gone quiet.

data.location: 6414 San Felipe St a, Houston, TX 77057
data.status: is expected to open; construction ... slated to start in July and wrap up in December; anticipated to open ... by winter
data.short_description: Himari plans a second location in a former Bank of America building at 6414 San Felipe Street, Suite A. The $600,000 renovation by Duckstache Hospitality will create a 4,511 sq ft sushi and Japanese-Vietnamese fusion restaurant.

data.location: 9257 N Loop 1604 W, Helotes, TX 78023, USA

data.short_description: Dave’s Hot Chicken will open at 9257 N Loop 1604 W in a 2,882 sq ft space with $525,000 in renovation and tenant finish-out. The Nashville-style hot chicken chain plans another addition to its San Antonio-area footprint.

data.status: upcoming Georgian bakery café; an opening date has not been announced
data.short_description: Thoné, a 14-seat Georgian bakery café at 501 E 6th St. in the East Village, will offer fresh-baked breads like kachapuri and lobiani, small plates, and pivot to a natural wine bar in the evenings.

data.location: 68-82 Burlington Mall Rd, Burlington (and Hanover location)

data.short_description: Pokeworks franchise partners are opening locations at Burlington Marketplace and Hanover Crossing as part of Greater Boston expansion. Additional sites are being pursued in various neighborhoods.

data.status: has plans for a move this year; hoping to debut the new spot in the fall
data.short_description: Jim’s Original is relocating from its UIC location to 551 W 18th Street in Pilsen. The new storefront will continue serving Maxwell Street staples and add a breakfast menu.

data.status: will open later this spring; will run for 120 days
data.short_description: The Westside Motor Lounge team is bringing LikeMinds pop-up to the former BrewDog space at 112 Krog St. NE. The 120-day concept merges music, cocktails, food, and community events.

data.short_description: Pinsarella Market will open at 8131 La Mesa Boulevard specializing in Pinsa Romana, antipasti, and a self-service wine/beer bar in a restaurant-marketplace format.

data.short_description: Pho 5Spices, an authentic Vietnamese eatery, is coming to 114 E. Broughton St. in downtown Savannah. It will focus on pho, grilled pork chop rice plates, grilled meat vermicelli bowls, and appetizers.

data.short_description: Huddle Tavern, a new sports bar, is planned for 604 N. Bell Blvd in Cedar Park with sweepstakes, games, TVs, drinks, and snacks.

data.short_description: Assembly restaurant from Saddleback BBQ owner Matt Gillett will open at 402 S Jefferson Street in downtown Mason. The menu will include burgers, steak frites, and more.
